prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SHM-RKSPDI-STD-BL-4-NCX Product Type: WRITING_INSTRUMENT Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical Invisible Ink Pen Secret Formula Disappearing Blue Gel Ink Pen Description: Need to leave a note for someone, but don't want to them to be able to show anyone else? The disappearing ink pen will allow you to do just that.

This special formula was developed during the Cold War and is now encapsulated within the discreet gel pen for general use. Once on the paper, the ink will appear normally for about 15 minutes. Within an hour, the message will have completely vanished and will be unrecoverable; even with ultraviolet light.

Note: deconstruction time of the ink will vary depending on ambient conditions. Search Terms: invisible vanishing ink spy gadget secret agent hidden diversion safe gag gift prison pen pal writing tool for government Features: - WATCH THE VIDEO: Once on paper, the ink appears fully legible and undiscernable from a normal pen for 15 minutes but slowly starts to disappear; fading within 20-30 minutes; completely after about an hour - REALLY WORKS: Looks like a real pen with no markings to distinquish it otherwise. Nine out of ten times, you might pick this pen out of a cup of many; it looks like a pen you would want to use; Magicians, spys and secrects oh my - WRITING CAPACITY: Invisible formula ball point pen will write up to 2500 feet before running out of ink; lots of use and entertainment for all ages - SPECIFICATIONS: Fine Point; Size: 0.5mm; Ink Color: Blue; Pen Case: Clear - WARNING: Do not use on any legal document or financial instrument === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
